C:\Users\vil\scoop\apps\cmake\current\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\bitset_test.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\vil\scoop\apps\mingw\current\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\bitset_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\bitset_test.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\vil\scoop\apps\mingw\current\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\bitset_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bitset_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libbitset_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\bitset_test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
